query.statment: CREATE TABLE "FCLTY_CNFG" ( "FCLTY_CNFG_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "CNFG_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "FCLTY_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "ASS_BEGIN_DATE" TIMESTAMP (6), "ASS_END_DATE" TIMESTAMP (6), "BUS_OBJ_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "SHFT_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "CONTRACT_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "REMARK" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE), "CREATED_BY" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "CREATION_TIME" TIMESTAMP (6), "OPTION1" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE), "OPTION2" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "OPTION3" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "RATE" NUMBER, "TRMNT_REMARK" VARCHAR2(200 BYTE) );

CREATE TABLE CONTRACT ( "ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "CLIENT_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "EMP_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "CONTACT_NUMBER" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "CONTACT_TITLE" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "CONTACT_TYPE" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "CONTACT_STATUS" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "CONTRACT_VALUE" NUMBER(*,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "PAYMENT_TYPE" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "BEGIN_DATE" DATE, "END_DATE" DATE, "REG_DATE" DATE, "NOTES" VARCHAR2(2000 BYTE), "CREATED_BY" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "CREATION_TIME" DATE, "OPTION1" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION2" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION3" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION4" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION5" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION6" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION7" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION8" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION9" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "OPTION10" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), CONSTRAINT "CONTRACT_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("ID"), CONSTRAINT "CONTRACT_NUMBER_UK" UNIQUE ("CONTACT_NUMBER") );

CREATE TABLE "EMPLOYEE_FINANCE" ("ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "EMP_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "EXPENSE_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "YEAR" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "MONTH" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "BASIC" FLOAT(126), "CURRENT_FINANCE" FLOAT(126), CREATED_BY VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), CREATION_TIME DATE , OPTION_1 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), OPTION_2 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), OPTION_3 VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) )
